title: Room For Two
description: Lets you share a bed with a villager or another player.
body:
# 💤 Room For Two
- Adds the ability for multiple players to sleep in a bed.
- When there are more than two players, they start to stack on top of each other!
- Changes the camera view while sleeping in a bed.

| Player              | Villager              |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
| ![Player in a bed looking at the viewer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YZlvzIFq/images/35278d3189696b8582108150ad6e97f59b45a3b8.png)            | ![Minecraft villager in a bed looking at the viewer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YZlvzIFq/images/8c52944f03d501f19c4d2bf6ffec57e87887095e.png)             |

## 🗺️ Roadmap
### Planned Features
These are subject to change and I'm open for any feedback (Open a github issue or DM me on Twitter). The goal I want for this mod is to keep it fairly simplistic, this means no new blocks or items.
- Position preferences (what side you face, on front or back)
- Better camera when entering the bed not in first person
- Port to as many mc versions & loaders as possible

## ⚙️ Modpack Usage
Room for Two is free to be used in any custom modpacks as long as credit is provided. However, compatibility with existing mods has not been tested for, so use at your own risk. I do not permit for any sort of monetisation or generative AI usage.
## 🔨 Version Support
Room For Two will get updates for as many versions as possible, prioritising most popular versions.
## 🐛 Issues
If you happen to experience any issues while using this mod, please report it to our [GitHub issue tracker](https://github.com/Sir-Cow/room-for-two/issues)! Please be as clear as possible when reporting any bugs or issues. Please note the mod is currently in an **ALPHA** state, so expect things to not be perfect yet.
